The '''Market Street Outdoor Exchange''' was a well-known outdoor market on [[Market Street (Taris)|Market Street]], located in the [[Upper City]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. The Outdoor Exchange was an area where businessmen and entrepreneurs could gather to offer investment opportunities.<ref name="prime" />

In [[3964 BBY]], a [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] self-proclaimed industrialist going by the name "[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Marn Hierogryph|Hieromarn]]" made the Market Street Outdoor Exchange the site for a sales pitch to prospective investors. Promising a three-for-one return on investment, Hieromarn attempted to convince locals to fund the purchase and crewing of a [[Tanker/Legends|tanker]], which would bring [[Fleek eel/Legends|fleek eels]] from<ref name="prime" /> the planet [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen's]]<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|II|48|Hocekureem Sea}}</ref> [[Hocekureem Sea/Legends|Hocekureem Sea]] to Taris for the local restaurant [[Merchant/Legends|trade]].<ref name="prime" /> During the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Taris Siege|siege]] of Taris the [[3963 BBY|following year]], the entire Market Street area was heavily looted. A short while after the departure of the looters, Market Street was seized by the Mandalorian invaders.<ref name="invasion">{{KOTORbackups|18}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Market Street Outdoor Exchange, although never actually making a direct appearance, was first mentioned in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]'', an [[in-universe]] news report appearing on the last page of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]], which was released in [[2006]].<ref name="prime" />
